/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/warehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/warehouse_interfaces/srv/detail/dds_fastrtps/assign_task__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
